channel.title: Consulting24 crypto licensing news
channel.description: Regulatory developments affecting crypto licensing, each sourced to a primary regulator publication.

item.title: ESMA tells unauthorised crypto firms to wind down EU operations as MiCA transition ends
item.description: ESMA has set out what crypto-asset service providers without a MiCA authorisation must do now that the transitional period has closed: stop onboarding EU clients, wind down in an orderly way, and keep AML controls running throughout.
